Nuestros Servicios / Our Services

Tax Services for Every Family

Desde tu primer ITIN hasta tu declaración anual — te acompañamos paso a paso. From your first ITIN to your annual filing, we walk every step with you in both languages.

ITIN Applications

Solicitudes ITIN

Certified Acceptance Agent service for Form W-7. We authenticate passports and supporting documents in-office — you keep your originals. Processing in 6 weeks.

1040 Personal Returns

Declaraciones 1040

Federal and state returns prepared accurately, maximizing every credit you qualify for.

Self-Employed Returns

Trabajadores Independientes

Schedule C, 1099-NEC, and quarterly estimates for contractors, drivers, and small business owners.

Amended Returns

Declaraciones Enmendadas

Form 1040-X corrections for missed credits, wrong filing status, or unreported income.

Multi-Year Catch-Up

Años Atrasados

Behind on filing? We prepare multiple years at once and negotiate penalty relief when possible.

Tax Planning

Planificación

Year-round planning to reduce your tax bill before filing season — for families and self-employed alike.

Track Record / Resultados

Números Reales · Real Numbers

Eight years serving bilingual families across every tax situation imaginable.

Years serving the community
About / Sobre Nosotros

Your Family.
En Tu Idioma.

Somos una firma bilingüe dedicada a servir a familias inmigrantes y trabajadores de habla hispana. Every conversation, every form, every phone call — always in the language you feel most comfortable.

From first-time ITIN applications to multi-year catch-up filings, we handle each case with the care and respect your family deserves. Your situation is never too complicated — we have seen it all.

IRS Acceptance AgentEnrolled AgentBilingual CertifiedNAEA
0
Years of bilingual tax service
0
Families served since day one
0
Languages — Spanish & English
0
Average client star rating
How It Works / Cómo Funciona

Three Simple Steps

Tres pasos sencillos. Sin estrés. Sin sorpresas.

1

Free Consultation

Consulta gratis en español o inglés. We review your documents and explain your options clearly.

2

Document Review

Bring passport, ID, and income docs. We authenticate everything in-office as a Certified Acceptance Agent.

3

Filing & Follow-Up

We file with the IRS and follow up until your ITIN is approved or your refund arrives.

Client Reviews / Testimonios

Lo Que Dicen Las Familias

“
“Nos ayudaron con nuestro primer ITIN y la declaración familiar. Nos explicaron todo en español con mucha paciencia.”
(They helped us with our first ITIN and family return. They explained everything in Spanish with great patience — we felt welcome from the first visit.)
Familia Hernández
First-Time ITIN · Mixed-Status Family
“
“Trabajo por mi cuenta y no había declarado tres años. Me ayudaron a enmendar todo y evité multas grandes.”
(I am self-employed and had not filed for three years. They helped me amend everything and I avoided big penalties — best decision I made this year.)
Carlos M.
Self-Employed · 3-Year Catch-Up
“
“Mi esposo tiene número de Seguro Social y yo no. Entendieron nuestra situación de familia de estatus mixto perfectamente.”
(My husband has an SSN and I do not. They understood our mixed-status family situation perfectly — we got the maximum refund legally possible.)
Rosa G.
Mixed-Status Family Filing

Tu Consulta Es Gratis
Your Consultation Is Free

Llama hoy y hablamos en español o inglés — lo que tú prefieras. Call today and we speak whichever language feels most comfortable for you.

Book a Consultation

Call, email, or fill out the form. Respondemos dentro de 24 horas — en el idioma que prefieras.
